description_long: This is a robust, circular stone fountain with a deep, bowl-shaped basin set atop a thick, cylindrical pedestal. The fountain is constructed from dark gray granite or similar stone, with a smooth, slightly polished finish and subtle horizontal banding around the rim and base. The basin features a central spout or fixture, and the outer surface of the pedestal is engraved with commemorative text, suggesting a memorial or historical function. The fountain sits on a square base of cobblestone paving, with some patches of grass and soil visible around the edges. Metal rings are attached to the rim, possibly for maintenance or decorative chains. The overall design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing durability and solemnity.
description: A heavy, circular stone fountain with a deep basin, engraved pedestal, and set on a cobblestone base. The design is sturdy and commemorative, with minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved text on the pedestal and the central spout in the basin, with metal rings visible on the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fountain's thick pedestal and the smooth, rounded contours of the basin, with less visible engraving.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more engraved text and a clear view of the cobblestone base, with a patch of exposed soil near the pedestal.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing partial engraving and the transition between the basin and pedestal, with some grass visible at the base.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features engraved commemorative text on the pedestal, but otherwise has minimal decorative elements. The rim is adorned with simple metal rings, and the overall style is utilitarian and solemn.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is deep and circular with a thick, rounded rim and a central spout. It is a single-tiered structure with no visible compartments or divisions.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is set on a square cobblestone base with some patches of grass and exposed soil around the edges. No additional landscaping or benches are visible.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the central spout is currently dry and inactive.
